title: amaryllis × rubrocrocea
intro: Amaryllis × rubrocrocea, also known as the hybrid amaryllis, is a cross between the Hippeastrum and Amaryllis genera, resulting in a unique and exotic-looking plant with large, trumpet-shaped flowers. The medicinal properties of Amaryllis × rubrocrocea lie in its bulbs, which contain alkaloids that have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent the spread of infections. Amaryllis × rubrocrocea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems.
